entity.name: ZeroGate Red Teaming
entity.description: Creator and maintainer of ZeroGate Red Teaming, an open source automated red teaming platform for multi-language codebase security analysis.

projects.name: ZeroGate Red Teaming
projects.description: An open source automated red teaming platform that analyzes multi-language codebases using Tree-sitter, builds comprehensive knowledge graphs, and enables natural language querying for security vulnerability detection. Supports 11 programming languages with a unified graph schema and functions as an MCP server for AI assistant integration.

plans.name: One-time donation
plans.description: Support ZeroGate Red Teaming development with a one-time contribution of any amount.

plans.name: Monthly supporter
plans.description: Recurring monthly support for ongoing development, security maintenance, and new language support.

plans.name: Annual sponsor
plans.description: Yearly sponsorship for sustained development of ZeroGate Red Teaming as open infrastructure for AI-powered codebase understanding.

history.description: Project launched in 2026. No external funding received.
